tips_en: Start with the PixelSmile paper as it introduces a new expression editing dataset and benchmark that can serve as a foundation for related generation tasks. Its approach to disentangled expression control via symmetric contrastive learning also complements the multi-reference and restoration methods discussed in the other papers, which all share diffusion‑based architectures and benchmark‑driven evaluation.
tips_zh: 建议首先阅读 PixelSmile 论文，因为它提出了新的表情编辑数据集和基准，可作为后续生成任务的基础。其通过对称对比学习实现的解耦表情控制方法也与另外两篇论文中的多参考图像生成和图像恢复技术相辅相成，这些工作都采用扩散模型并强调基准评测。
